title: lithocarpus bulusanensis
intro: Lithocarpus bulusanensis, also known as Bulusan oak, is a species of tree endemic to the Philippines. It is valued for its medicinal properties, particularly in treating respiratory issues, such as bronchitis and asthma, due to its expectorant and anti-inflammatory compounds. The health benefits of Lithocarpus bulusanensis include reducing fever, alleviating cough, and supporting the immune system. Traditionally, the plant is prepared as a decoction or infusion to create herbal remedies, although further research is necessary to confirm its effectiveness and safety.
